bathtub: Curved and smooth edges (oval or rectangular basin shape)
Presence of flat or slightly inclined base
Handles or fixtures like taps or knobs
Relative depth compared to surrounding features
bed: Rectangular shape with a flat top surface
Uniform planar surface for the mattress
Raised above the ground with legs or a frame
bookshelf: Series of vertical and horizontal flat planes (shelves)
Relatively taller and narrower aspect ratio
cabinet: Doors or drawers with a flush surface
Handles or knobs as distinct features
Larger enclosed volume with minimal open space
chair: L-shaped structure with a flat seat and backrest
Smaller overall dimensions compared to beds and sofas
Angular relationships between the seat and backrest
lamp: Presence of rounded or smooth shapes
monitor: Support stand with a flat or curved base
Absence of open spaces like shelves
plant: Irregular, organic branching structure (stems or trunks)
Clustered or distributed leaf-like patterns with high variability
Presence of fine, thin components (leaves, branches)
Central base or root structure connected to a pot or ground
sofa: Smooth transitions between seating and backrest
table: Relatively larger top area compared to a chair
Absence of backrest or armrest features
